metadata.description: Personal collection of skills and plugins for AI agents

plugins.name: kb
plugins.description: Agent-maintained knowledge bases — persistent, scoped, searchable, git-backed. Six skills (registry, info, remember, stage, recall, retrospective), four slash commands (/kb:bootstrap, /kb:add, /kb:status, /kb:sync), and a kb-dream agent for dry-run-first inbox consolidation, all over a shared `kb` CLI.

plugins.name: spec-driven-execution
plugins.description: Spec-driven execution model for non-trivial tasks that benefit from durable, explicit planning, design, and validation steps. Each change is captured in a self-contained folder with a mini-spec (description + validation + tasks) written before any code; archived folders double as the decision record.
